description: Immutable checksum of the pre-split monolithic public/styles.css (fa45fb2^). verify-css-split.mjs compares the concatenated @import tree against this fixture so shallow CI checkouts do not need historical Git objects.
updateInstructions: When intentionally changing CSS content, concatenate public/styles.css imports, recompute utf8ByteLength and sha256, then update this fixture in the same commit.
